expectations.text: Triggered the skill despite no explicit marketing keywords
expectations.evidence: The response lacks the assumption statement present in with_skill runs and is shorter and less detailed, indicating the marketing skill was not triggered.

expectations.text: Gives a focused acquisition plan (channels matched to audience, one motion to start, content/proof)
expectations.evidence: The response gives a phased plan: personal outreach first, then one social channel ('Pick one social channel and commit'), then paid amplification — focused and channel-matched.

expectations.text: Is not a vague pep talk
expectations.evidence: The response offers concrete actions: seeding with free product, specific platform options, email list building, and retargeting ads — not motivational fluff.
The response neither asks about the product/audience nor states any assumptions about the store type before diving into advice.
